Class EnemyChar

java.lang.Object
Character_Classes.GameCharacter
Character_Classes.EnemyChar
public class EnemyChar extends GameCharacter
Represents a hostile NPC entity within the dungeon grid. Handles enemy specific behaviors including turn intervals, detection ranges, random movement avoiding heat tiles, and dropping gold upon defeat.

  • Constructor Details

    • EnemyChar

      public EnemyChar(String name, float health, float attack, int goldDrop, int turnsPerMove, int detectionRange, int x, int y)
      Constructs an enemy character with defined combat stats, drop values, and grid position.
      Parameters:
      name - the designation of the enemy
      health - the initial health points
      attack - the base damage power
      goldDrop - the amount of gold dropped upon death
      turnsPerMove - how often the enemy moves relative to player turns
      detectionRange - the sight radius for spotting the player
      x - the starting X grid coordinate
      y - the starting Y grid coordinate

  • Method Details

    • getGoldDrop

      public int getGoldDrop()
      Returns:
      the gold drop amount

    • setGoldDrop

      public void setGoldDrop(int goldDrop)
      Parameters:
      goldDrop - the new gold drop amount

    • getTurnsPerMove

      public int getTurnsPerMove()
      Returns:
      the number of turns required per move

    • setTurnsPerMove

      public void setTurnsPerMove(int turnsPerMove)
      Parameters:
      turnsPerMove - the new turn interval layout

    • getDetectionRange

      public int getDetectionRange()
      Returns:
      the player detection radius

    • setDetectionRange

      public void setDetectionRange(int detectionRange)
      Parameters:
      detectionRange - the new player detection radius

    • dropGold

      public void dropGold(Floor floor)
      Spawns a gold treasure tile at the enemy's current grid position upon defeat.
      Parameters:
      floor - the current Floor map context where the tile is placed

    • detectPlayer

      public boolean detectPlayer(Tile[][] map, PlayableChar Yohane)
      Calculates whether the player character is within the enemy's detection range using Manhattan distance calculation.
      Parameters:
      map - the 2D grid matrix of the current floor
      Yohane - the playable character instance to track
      Returns:
      true if the player is within range, false otherwise

    • move

      public void move(Floor floor, PlayableChar entity)
      Manages the enemy's turn execution. Checks turn intervals to either attack the player if detected, or pick a random direction that avoids heat ('h') tiles.
      Parameters:
      floor - the current Floor context
      entity - the playable character acting as the turn and target reference
